educational_objective: Pictures can help when words are not enough: shoes, teeth, toilet, coat, bag. The aim is not a perfect routine; it is giving your child something concrete to follow.
age_stage_nuance: Versus 31–33m: jobs feel real — choose clothes, carry the bag, brush teeth without you narrating every step. Photos of your actual routine may beat generic cards. Critical FF note for this band: Ages 3+ / under-36 choking marks fail Top Picks because band includes 34–35m.
what_to_look_for: Photo-first or clear home symbols; short strips for door or Now/Next; wipe-clean durable cards; Ages 2+ parseable marks; brand-primary UK URLs; parent-buy utility not gift packaging.
what_to_avoid: Under-36 / Ages 3+ listings for Top Picks in this band; Amazon-primary when brand exists; Etsy/Temu printables; whole-day charts when one transition hurts; 60-minute timers as first buy.
methodology: Re-researched 2026-07-22 after FF quarantine (unparsed ages, missing ratings, 429 URLs). Verified brand URLs live (Create Visual Aids, Little Goose, Craftly). Captured Ages 2+ parseable marks. Prefer products with real review counts; applied specialist exemptions with long evidence_notes only for Create Visual Aids door/Now-Next SKUs and Craftly Now-Next. Explicitly excluded under-36 timers and ASD boards from Top 5 despite high Amazon ratings.

community_sources_checked: Amazon UK review themes for Create Visual Aids
Little Goose and Craftly on-page parent reviews
safety_sources_checked: Retailer age marks and choking exclusions
FF stage3-ff-check age gate rules for 34–36m

key_specs.dimensions: Cards approx. 6 x 5.5 cm; boards A4 length
key_specs.materials: Water-resistant plastic cards, foamex boards, VELCRO Brand fasteners
key_specs.included_items: 35 home routine symbols, 2 display boards, hook-and-loop attached
key_specs.other: Shows up to 10 cards at once; made in UK

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Thirty-five durable home-routine picture cards with two A4 boards and Velcro. Displays up to ten steps of the day.
top_picks.ember_verdict: If fridge photos have not stuck, this is the grown-up version — rearrangeable home symbols for shoes, teeth, coat, bag. At nearly three, independence wants a visible plan, not a lecture. Try your own photos first; buy if DIY still fails after a fortnight.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be wanting to do the jobs themselves and getting stuck at the same morning transition
top_picks.why_it_fits: Mainstream UK home timetable with rearrangeable cards matching whole-routine independence without school-only symbols.
top_picks.caveats: Generic symbols, not your child’s room — photos may still beat this. Ten-card display limit.
top_picks.gift_note: Parent-buy utility; not a gift unless parents asked.
top_picks.ownership_note: Try phone photos of your real routine first — skip if that already works.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small cards — supervise around younger siblings; store unused symbols out of reach.
top_picks.rating_source: Amazon UK (same Create Visual Aids Home Visual Timetable SKU)
top_picks.review_quality_note: Strong Amazon volume for brand-sold SKU; brand site shows 4 reviews. No under-36 choking exclusion on Amazon listing; marketed for toddlers/preschool.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Cards hold up; check Velcro and missing symbols.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Create Visual Aids Now and Next Board plus 35 symbols for home
top_picks.evidence_notes: Brand primary URL live. Ratings from brand Amazon storefront for identical Home Visual Timetable. Ages 2+ from toddler/preschool marketing and parent-setup use; no under-3 safety exclusion on listing.
top_picks.consensus_corroboration: Surfaces across Amazon UK and UK SEN parent forums for home timetables.
top_picks.editorial_mentions: Commonly cited in UK autism/ADHD visual-support buying threads.

key_specs.piece_count: 2 A4 planners, 35 task cards, velcro dots, storage bag
key_specs.dimensions: Planner A4; task cards 3.7 x 3.7 cm
key_specs.included_items: Separate morning and evening planners with illustrated flap cards
key_specs.other: Adult setup required — cut flaps and attach velcro; brand states ages 2+

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Morning and evening A4 planners with thirty-five illustrated velcro task cards. Child closes each flap when a step is done.
top_picks.ember_verdict: Prettier than clinic boards — useful if mornings and bedtimes are the only war zones. Flap-close gives a nearly-three a finished-job feeling fridge photos may lack. Adult prep night one. Not for whole-day planning. Currently sold out on brand site — watch restock or use Create Visual Aids morning strip as interim.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be needing a visible win when a morning step is done before moving on
top_picks.why_it_fits: Explicit Ages 2+ morning/evening split with tactile progress suits independence pride at this age.
top_picks.caveats: Sold out at research date on littlegoose.co.uk. Setup faff. Premium versus Create Visual Aids.
top_picks.gift_note: Parent-buy; pretty packaging but still a routine utility.
top_picks.ownership_note: Skip if photos already work for AM/PM only.
top_picks.safety_notes: Velcro dots are small — attach firmly; supervise setup.
top_picks.review_quality_note: 19 brand reviews averaging about 4.95; parents praise morning calm and flap mechanic; note setup time.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Laminated planners wear well; check velcro and missing cards.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Create Visual Aids Out The Door Chart for leave-house steps, or Craftly Daily Routine Board when in stock
top_picks.evidence_notes: Brand explicitly states Suitable for children aged 2+. Rating 4.95 from 19 on-page reviews meets FF numeric gate. Stock out at check — keep as pick with substitute.
top_picks.consensus_corroboration: Indie toy-shop and parent Instagram praise; less mainstream than Create Visual Aids.
top_picks.editorial_mentions: Award-shortlist mentions for routine planners in UK indie toy coverage.

key_specs.piece_count: 1 A5 aluminium board; tokens sold separately
key_specs.materials: Printed aluminium metal board; waterproof zip folder
key_specs.included_items: Board, zip folder, velcro or magnetic strip option; tokens extra
key_specs.other: Handmade in UK; Now/Next or Now/Next/Then layouts

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Handmade A5 aluminium Now-Next-Then board with zip folder. Tokens sold separately so you can match your child’s real jobs.
top_picks.ember_verdict: When the whole day feels like too much, shrink the horizon: Now shoes, Next park. Metal tokens feel special versus paper printouts — still try fridge photos first. Buy the board plus the tokens you will actually use, not a huge pack.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be stalling when one fun thing ends and the next boring step begins
top_picks.why_it_fits: Two- or three-step transition board matches sticky hand-offs better than a ten-step wall chart for many nearly-threes.
top_picks.caveats: Tokens not included — budget for them. Product-level review count is thin (5); specialist exemption applied.
top_picks.ownership_note: Two printed photos and blu-tack can trial Now/Next before spending.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small metal tokens — supervise around babies; not a toy.
top_picks.review_quality_note: 5 on-product reviews (all 5-star) including preschool parent reports; brand store about 2,500 reviews at about 4.9.
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Metal board lasts; tokens may go missing.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Create Visual Aids Now and Next Board plus 35 symbols for home
top_picks.evidence_notes: SPECIALIST EXEMPTION: Craftly is a UK handmade SEN/visual-support maker (ELSA-informed). This SKU has only 5 on-page reviews but they are detailed preschool-parent reports (including a 3-year-old transition calm). Brand aggregate exceeds 2,000 five-star reviews across visual planners. Specs and URL verified live 2026-07-22. Ages 2+ as parent-setup preschool tool (brand: kids of all ages; reviews cite preschool). Prefer this over Autism Supplies Now/Next which carries under-36 choking exclusion incompatible with 34-36m band.
top_picks.consensus_corroboration: Now/Next formats widely recommended in UK autism transition guidance; Craftly is a popular handmade UK maker in parent communities.
top_picks.editorial_mentions: Featured in UK indie SEN visual-support shop roundups.

key_specs.materials: Plastic visuals, foamex boards, VELCRO Brand fasteners
key_specs.included_items: Lunchbox, water, bag, coat, shoes, trainers, PE kit and other leave-the-house symbols

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Door-side chart with twelve removable leave-the-house cards on two green boards. Child checks bag, coat and shoes without the nag list.
top_picks.ember_verdict: The front-door moment is where nearly-three independence meets your lateness. Narrows the job to one strip: what goes out with us. Hang it where they leave, not on a bedroom wall they ignore. Photos by the actual shoes may still win — buy if repetition is wearing you down.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be dawdling at the door or forgetting the same item every time you leave
top_picks.why_it_fits: Focused leave-the-house strip beats a full timetable when the pain is coats, bags and shoes at the threshold.
top_picks.caveats: Only one brand-site review — specialist exemption. Same brand as heavily reviewed Visual Timetable.
top_picks.gift_note: Parent-buy only — too specific for unsolicited gifting.
top_picks.ownership_note: A photo strip by the door may be enough.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small cards — keep away from babies; supervise first weeks.
top_picks.review_quality_note: Single on-page review; brand credibility supported by sibling SKU Amazon 4.7/683.
evidence_sources: Create Visual Aids Out The Door product page
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Compact set; easy to sanitise and reuse.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Create Visual Aids Out The Door Visuals PDF plus existing board, or photo strip DIY
top_picks.evidence_notes: SPECIALIST EXEMPTION: Create Visual Aids is a UK teacher-founded SEN visual specialist. This door-chart SKU has thin on-page reviews (1) but is the same durable plastic/Velcro system as the Home Visual Timetable (Amazon 4.7 from 683 ratings, brand-sold). Product page verified live 2026-07-22 with clear leave-house symbol set. Ages 2+ as toddler/preschool parent-setup aid (age-agnostic routine tool; no under-3 exclusion on brand listing). Prefer brand URL over Amazon primary per FF doctrine.
top_picks.consensus_corroboration: Door charts cited in SEN routine setup guides alongside Create Visual Aids home range.
top_picks.editorial_mentions: Featured in UK visual-support retailer collections for transitions.

top_picks.product_name: Now and Next Board plus 35 symbols for home

key_specs.piece_count: 35 home symbols, 1 Now and Next board
key_specs.materials: Water-resistant plastic symbols, VELCRO Brand fasteners
key_specs.included_items: Two-step board plus home routine symbol set

top_picks.product_description_under_30_words: Now and Next board with thirty-five home picture symbols. Shows the current task and what comes straight after.
top_picks.ember_verdict: When a full-day chart overwhelms, shrink it: Now brush teeth, Next story. Same Beanies language as the big timetable without ten cards staring at once. Do not buy both full timetable and this unless you truly need both formats.
top_picks.personalization_hint: likely to be needing only the next step visible, not the whole morning list
top_picks.why_it_fits: Two-step format matches transition pain and short attention at nearly three.
top_picks.caveats: Overlaps symbol set with full timetable. Thin product-level reviews — specialist exemption.
top_picks.ownership_note: Trial with two photos before buying a full symbol set.
top_picks.safety_notes: Small symbols — supervise around younger siblings.
top_picks.rating_source: Create Visual Aids listing (sibling SKU ratings on Amazon)
top_picks.review_quality_note: No aggregated count on this SKU page; specialist exemption via brand + sibling evidence.
evidence_sources: Create Visual Aids Now and Next + symbols page
top_picks.preloved_signal_note: Board and symbols survive well second-hand.
top_picks.substitute_if_unavailable: Craftly Now, Next Then Visual Timetable
top_picks.evidence_notes: SPECIALIST EXEMPTION: Same Create Visual Aids UK specialist brand and plastic/Velcro system as the Home Visual Timetable (Amazon 4.7/683). Bundle includes 35 home symbols matching the independence brief (teeth, shoes, coat, toilet). Brand URL live 2026-07-22 (avoids prior 429 on alternate paths). Ages 2+ parent-setup toddler/preschool tool; no under-3 exclusion on brand listing. Chosen over Autism Supplies Now/Next Later despite that product higher Amazon count because ASD listing carries not suitable under 36 months, which fails the 34-36m FF age gate.
top_picks.consensus_corroboration: Now/Next boards widely recommended in UK autism and SLT transition guidance.
top_picks.editorial_mentions: NHS-linked and local authority visual-support resources reference Now and Next formats.

skips.product_name: Generic Etsy / Temu visual routine printables
skips.skip_reason: Default exclusion — printables and unverified marketplace sets fail photos-first and FF evidence bar.
skips.evidence_notes: Try free phone photos before paid printables.

skips.skip_reason: Ages 4-5+ sits above 34-36m band; also sold out at research.

guidance_notes.text: Try photos of your real routine on the fridge or cupboard first — shoes by the actual shoes, toothbrush by the sink. Buy cards only if DIY visuals are not sticking after two weeks.
For this band, skip Top Picks labelled Ages 3+ or not suitable under 36 months — that excludes 34–35 month children. Prefer Ages 2+ parent-setup tools.
If you used a simpler picture strip earlier, bring it back out with fewer steps and let your nearly-three reorder the cards — the shift is real jobs, not new kit.
Hold dedicated visual timers until 36m+ if listings carry under-36 choking marks. A phone timer on the bathroom shelf is enough for teeth jobs now.
Hold off on full-day timetables if only one transition hurts — a Now/Next board or door strip may be enough.

qa_summary.notes: Picks 1–2 meet numeric rating gates. Picks 3–5 use evidence_exemption specialist with long evidence_notes. Little Goose currently out_of_stock. Timers and ASD boards with under-36 marks moved to skips/backups.

required_fix_before_ingestion: Confirm Little Goose restock or swap substitute if still OOS at ingest
Founder review specialist exemptions on picks 3–5
ingestion_ready.founder_review_notes: Re-research to clear FF quarantine: parseable Ages 2+, brand primary URLs, photos-first parent-buy. Three specialist exemptions documented. High-rating under-36 products intentionally not Top Picks.
